meta.title: Acrobatic Gymnastics Club Management Software in Spain | Zaltyko
meta.description: Manage your federated acrobatic gymnastics club with Zaltyko. Full control over athletes, categories, difficulty levels, pairs, groups and licenses.

hero.headline: Manage your federated acrobatic gymnastics club with ease
hero.subheadline: Full control over athletes, official categories, difficulty levels, D/E scores and licenses. Manage pairs and groups from Base to Elite.

painPoints.generic: Coordinating acrobatic pairs and groups is chaos without the right tool. Tracking difficulty levels, compositions and scores in Excel is a disaster.
painPoints.specific: Managing pair and group combinations, coordinating when a gymnast changes category, tracking D (difficulty) and E (execution) scores.
